name: app_update_user_preferences
description: Update GitKraken CLI user preferences for MCP apps. App-only; agents must not call this tool.

git_commit_composer_app_collapsed.description: When true, future Git Commit Composer overview app loads start in the collapsed state.

git_graph_app_collapsed.description: When true, future Git Graph overview app loads start in the collapsed state.

git_status_app_collapsed.description: When true, future Git Status overview app loads start in the collapsed state.
